system: You are a direct-response copywriter. Write clear, concrete copy and avoid hype words.

messages.content: Write three subject lines and a 90-word email body announcing Northwind Retail's fall clearance to lapsed customers who last purchased more than nine months ago. The offer is 30 percent off outdoor gear through the end of the month. Keep the tone warm but not desperate, and do not use exclamation points.

Draft two versions of a 140-character paid search headline plus description for Acme Logistics' same-day delivery service in mid-size metro markets. One version should lead with speed, the other with reliability.

Rewrite this landing page hero so it speaks to operations managers rather than executives: 'Transform your supply chain with end-to-end visibility and best-in-class orchestration.' Make it concrete about what the reader actually does on a Tuesday morning.

system: Extract SEO metadata. Return JSON with keys title, description, keywords.

messages.content: Extract a page title under 60 characters, a meta description under 155 characters, and five keywords for this article: 'How regional distributors cut last-mile delivery costs by consolidating evening routes and shifting low-priority parcels to next-day windows.'

system: Extract SEO metadata. Return JSON with keys title, description, keywords.

messages.content: Extract a page title, meta description, and five keywords for this help center article: 'Setting up recurring inventory exports to cloud storage, including schedule options, file naming, and what to do when an export fails validation.'

system: Extract SEO metadata. Return JSON with keys title, description, keywords.

messages.content: Extract SEO metadata for this blog post draft: 'Five signs your warehouse management process has outgrown spreadsheets, with a short checklist for deciding whether to migrate this quarter or next.'

system: You check drafts against brand guidelines. The Northwind Retail voice is plain, specific, and second-person. Banned: 'revolutionary', 'game-changing', 'unlock', 'seamless'. Report violations as a short list, or 'pass' if clean.

messages.content: Check this draft: 'Our revolutionary new fulfillment engine unlocks seamless visibility across every node in your network, so you can finally stop guessing.'

system: You check drafts against brand guidelines. The Northwind Retail voice is plain, specific, and second-person. Banned: 'revolutionary', 'game-changing', 'unlock', 'seamless'. Report violations as a short list, or 'pass' if clean.

messages.content: Check this draft: 'You can schedule your evening routes the night before. Most stores finish the setup in about ten minutes, and you can change it any time from the operations dashboard.'

system: You check drafts against brand guidelines. The Northwind Retail voice is plain, specific, and second-person. Banned: 'revolutionary', 'game-changing', 'unlock', 'seamless'. Report violations as a short list, or 'pass' if clean.

messages.content: Check this social post draft against the guidelines: 'A game-changing update is here. Seamless. Effortless. Everything your team has been waiting for, and then some.'

Summarize this campaign week for a dashboard card in at most three sentences: impressions 1.2M (up 8 percent), clicks 18,400 (down 3 percent), cost per acquisition $41.20 (up from $36.90), and two of five creatives paused for low relevance. Say what changed and what to look at next.

Write a two-sentence dashboard summary of this email program: 240,000 sends, 31 percent open rate, 4.1 percent click rate, 0.19 percent unsubscribe rate, and a lapsed-customer segment that outperformed the house list on clicks by nearly double.

Summarize for a dashboard card: paid social spend held flat at $54,000 this month while attributed revenue fell from $310,000 to $268,000, driven almost entirely by one audience segment whose frequency climbed above six.
